workspace.name: Phase Seven Execution Desk
workspace.product_boundary: Research, watchlist, and paper-trade governance only; no live execution.

review_policy.release_rule: A dossier is team-release-ready only when registry validation passes, required approvals are present, and no review has requested changes or rejected the thesis.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Control Environment
soc2_readiness_program.description: Workspace owner and active role directory are configured.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Communication And Information
soc2_readiness_program.description: Review assignments, comments, and approvals are persisted as audit records.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Risk Assessment
soc2_readiness_program.description: Release readiness checks combine dossier validation with required human approvals.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Logical Access
soc2_readiness_program.description: Approval authority is role-bound by review type.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Change Management
soc2_readiness_program.description: Model/tool registry and validation status are included in release controls.

soc2_readiness_program.name: Availability And Audit Export
soc2_readiness_program.description: A portable governance export can reconstruct team review state.

workspace.name: Phase Seven Execution Desk
workspace.product_boundary: Research, watchlist, and paper-trade governance only; no live execution.
